query:
-- Migration for review_moderations, contractor_analytics, and email_notifications tables
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS review_moderations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  reviewId INT NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected', 'request_changes') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  reason TEXT,
  moderatorId INT,
  moderatedAt TIMESTAMP,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contractor_analytics (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  contractorUserId INT NOT NULL,
  totalReviewsSubmitted INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  totalDisputesReceived INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  totalDisputesResponded INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  disputeResponseRate DECIMAL(5, 2) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  averageReputationScore DECIMAL(3, 1) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  mostCommonRedFlag VARCHAR(128),
  redFlagCounts TEXT,
  reviewsThisMonth INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  reviewsLastMonth INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS email_notifications (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  type ENUM('trial_expiring_7_days', 'trial_expiring_1_day', 'trial_expired', 'dispute_filed', 'review_posted', 'review_approved', 'review_rejected') NOT NULL,
  recipientEmail VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'sent', 'failed') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  sentAt TIMESTAMP,
  failureReason TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
